name: madeline-portfolio

scripts.ci:local: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test:coverage && npm run build && npm audit --audit-level=high
scripts.ci: docker compose -f docker-compose.ci.yml run --rm --build ci && npm run scan:secrets
scripts.sonar: npm run test:coverage && docker compose -f docker-compose.ci.yml up -d sonarqube && docker compose -f docker-compose.ci.yml run --rm sonar-scanner

_overrides_note: Both advisories are transitive through next, and `npm audit fix` only
offers next@9.3.3 - a six-major downgrade - so the versions are forced
sharp: libvips CVEs, fixed in 0.35.0. next declares it as an OPTIONAL
dependency at ^0.34.3, which cannot resolve to 0.35. Nothing in this
app imports next/image, so sharp is never actually invoked.
postcss: unescaped </style> XSS in stringify output, fixed in 8.5.10.
Revisit when next ships updated bounds - these can then be dropped.
